Describe the element in the image below.

response.content: {"description": "A large-diaphragm condenser studio microphone with a matte champagne/silver cylindrical body and a fine woven metal mesh grille at the top. The body bears the text 'PHANTOM classic' and a circular logo emblem, with 'Nr. 1307' engraved near the base. The microphone is mounted in a silver elastic shock mount cradle with black rubber bands. A round black pop filter with dual mesh layers is attached via a flexible gooseneck arm positioned in front of the capsule.", "consistencyTag": "silver-condenser-studio-microphone"}
